title: Dyn-allocator residuals: modelSetDistanceDisabled early-return leak (T9b); glass float-mtx path lacks fail-closed contract

history.note: Part (a) modelSetDistanceDisabled early-return leak (T9b) landed in ee771e7 (front.c/title.c reset the flag before each overflow early-return). Part (b) glass-shard float-mtx path VERIFIED already fail-closed: unk_0A1DA0.c:1319-1327 skips the shard (piece_offset+=0x68;continue) when dynAllocate(sizeof(Mtxf)) returns NULL, and dynAllocate internally honors GE007_DYN_LEGACY_ALIAS + increments g_dyn_overflow_count (dynNoteOverflow) — the M1.2 caller sweep covered this path; no code change needed. Added permanent regression lane tools/dyn_glass_stress_smoke.sh (ctest port_dyn_glass_stress_smoke, in the tier-2 -R port_ sweep) forcing VTX-arena overflow on the Dam shatter route via GE007_DYN_STRESS_LIMIT=16384. A/B PROVEN + deterministic (3/3 runs): fix (default) dyn_overflow_max=8, emits 5 shards, skips 43, screen_spanning=0, preclip=0, bad_cmds/crashes=0, only dyn_overflow moves; GE007_DYN_LEGACY_ALIAS=1 restores aliasing (emits all 48 overflowed shards, and non-deterministically SIGSEGVs mid-render on an aliased texture ptr — the R3 corruption). Byte-identical at defaults by construction (no compiled-source change). Artifacts: scratchpad/fid0007_stress_ab/ (stress_ab_summary.json, legacy_midrender_crash_frame3.log). Tier-1 gates my change touches all green (sim_render_separation, shell syntax, validation smoke registry, ledger validate).
